gaps: No test covers DFU progress bar behavior at specific percentages (e.g., stalling at 99%). All existing tests treat DFU as a binary pass/fail or error-state scenario, not monitoring progress granularity or timeouts.
No test validates DFU completion time expectations (1-2 min vs 10+ min). The bug is about excessive duration at 99%, which is a performance/timing issue, not a crash or error screen.
No lifecycle/interruption test validates what happens when the app is backgrounded or the screen is turned off while DFU is stuck at 99% — does the progress eventually complete or fail silently?
No test validates DFU progress behavior across device asymmetry: Voyager 5200 Series vs Voyager 8200 UC may have different firmware sizes or update mechanisms that cause the 99% stall differently.
No test validates the DFU progress bar behavior during Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect while stuck at 99% — does the app recover, show an error, or eventually complete?
No test validates the DFU progress bar behavior when the app is force-killed and relaunched while stuck at 99% — does the update resume, restart, or show inconsistent state?
No test validates the DFU progress bar behavior during a concurrent operation (e.g., incoming call, media playback) while stuck at 99%.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-001: Validate DFU progress does not stall at 99% beyond acceptable threshold (Voyager 5200 Series)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 5200 Series connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update
If update available, tap 'Update Now' and start timer.
Monitor progress bar percentage every 10 seconds.
Record time spent at each percentage point, especially 99%.
Continue monitoring until DFU completes (100% + 'Update Complete' message) or fails.
generated_testcases.expected: Total DFU time ≤ 3 minutes. Time spent at any single percentage (including 99%) ≤ 30 seconds. If time at 99% exceeds 30 seconds → FAIL (Bug: Language update stall at 99%). Progress bar must advance monotonically; no regression to lower percentage.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-002: Validate DFU progress does not stall at 99% beyond acceptable threshold (Voyager 8200 UC)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 8200 UC connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update
If update available, tap 'Update Now' and start timer.
Monitor progress bar percentage every 10 seconds.
Record time spent at each percentage point, especially 99%.
Continue monitoring until DFU completes (100% + 'Update Complete' message) or fails.
generated_testcases.expected: Total DFU time ≤ 3 minutes. Time spent at any single percentage (including 99%) ≤ 30 seconds. If time at 99% exceeds 30 seconds → FAIL (Bug: Language update stall at 99%). Note: Voyager 8200 UC may have larger firmware; acceptable total time ≤ 4 minutes, but per-percentage stall threshold remains ≤ 30 seconds.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-003: Validate DFU progress timing — total completion time must not exceed 3 minutes (Voyager 5200 Series)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 5200 Series connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update
If update available, tap 'Update Now' and start timer.
Stop timer when 'Update Complete' is displayed.
Repeat for 3 consecutive update cycles (if multiple updates available) or across 3 separate test runs.
generated_testcases.expected: Each DFU cycle completes in ≤ 3 minutes from tap to 'Update Complete'. No single run exceeds 3 minutes. If any run exceeds 3 minutes → FAIL (Bug: 10+ minute update regression). Average time across runs ≤ 2 minutes.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-004: Validate DFU progress timing — total completion time must not exceed 4 minutes (Voyager 8200 UC)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 8200 UC connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update
If update available, tap 'Update Now' and start timer.
Stop timer when 'Update Complete' is displayed.
Repeat for 3 consecutive update cycles (if multiple updates available) or across 3 separate test runs.
generated_testcases.expected: Each DFU cycle completes in ≤ 4 minutes from tap to 'Update Complete'. No single run exceeds 4 minutes. If any run exceeds 4 minutes → FAIL (Bug: 10+ minute update regression on Voyager 8200 UC). Average time across runs ≤ 2.5 minutes.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-005: Validate DFU progress survives app backgrounding while stuck at 99% (Voyager 5200 Series)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 5200 Series connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update
Monitor progress until it reaches 99% (or stall at 99% if bug present).
Immediately press Home button to background the app.
Wait 2 minutes in background state.
Return app to foreground by tapping app icon.
Observe progress bar state and any error/dialog messages.
Wait additional 3 minutes for completion.
generated_testcases.expected: After returning to foreground: progress bar shows same or advanced percentage (no regression). If update completed in background, 'Update Complete' shown. If still at 99%, progress must resume and complete within 3 additional minutes. No 'Update Failed' or indefinite spinner. Actual (If Bug): App shows stale 99% indefinitely or fails silently after backgrounding.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-006: Validate DFU progress survives screen-off while stuck at 99% (Voyager 8200 UC)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 8200 UC connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update
Monitor progress until it reaches 99% (or stall at 99% if bug present).
Press power button to turn off screen (device locked).
Wait 3 minutes with screen off.
Turn screen on and unlock device.
Open app and observe DFU progress state.
Wait additional 3 minutes for completion.
generated_testcases.expected: After screen-on: progress bar shows same or advanced percentage. No error dialog. Update must complete within 3 additional minutes. Actual (If Bug): App shows stale 99% or update silently fails with no user notification.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-007: Validate DFU progress survives Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect while stuck at 99% (Voyager 5200 Series)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 5200 Series connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update
Monitor progress until it reaches 99% (or stall at 99% if bug present).
From phone Bluetooth settings, tap 'Forget' or 'Disconnect' to force BT disconnect.
Wait 10 seconds.
Re-pair and reconnect Voyager 5200 Series to phone.
Open app and observe DFU progress state.
Wait 5 minutes for any recovery or completion.
generated_testcases.expected: After reconnection: App detects interrupted update and shows appropriate state — either 'Update Failed' with retry option, or resumes from last known progress. No inconsistent state (e.g., showing 99% but no progress for 5+ minutes). Actual (If Bug): App shows 99% indefinitely with no recovery mechanism, or shows 'Update Complete' without actual completion.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-008: Validate DFU progress survives Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect while stuck at 99% (Voyager 8200 UC)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 8200 UC connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update
Monitor progress until it reaches 99% (or stall at 99% if bug present).
Turn off headset power to force BT disconnect.
Wait 15 seconds.
Turn on headset power and wait for auto-reconnect.
Open app and observe DFU progress state.
Wait 5 minutes for any recovery or completion.
generated_testcases.expected: After reconnection: App detects interrupted update and shows appropriate state — either 'Update Failed' with retry option, or resumes from last known progress. No inconsistent state. Actual (If Bug): App shows 99% indefinitely with no recovery mechanism, or shows 'Update Complete' without actual completion.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-009: Validate DFU progress survives app force-kill and relaunch while stuck at 99% (Voyager 5200 Series)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 5200 Series connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update
Monitor progress until it reaches 99% (or stall at 99% if bug present).
Force-kill the app (swipe from recent apps or OS app settings → Force Stop).
Wait 10 seconds.
Relaunch the app.
Observe initial screen and any DFU state indicators.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update
Wait 3 minutes for any recovery or completion.
generated_testcases.expected: After relaunch: App shows appropriate state — either 'Update Failed' with retry option, or 'Update Complete' if DFU finished in background, or option to resume/restart update. No stale 99% progress bar. No inconsistent state where app shows device as updated but firmware version hasn't changed. Actual (If Bug): App shows 99% frozen progress bar or shows device as fully updated when update was incomplete.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-010: Validate DFU progress survives app force-kill and relaunch while stuck at 99% (Voyager 8200 UC)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 8200 UC connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update
Monitor progress until it reaches 99% (or stall at 99% if bug present).
Force-kill the app (swipe from recent apps or OS app settings → Force Stop).
Wait 10 seconds.
Relaunch the app.
Observe initial screen and any DFU state indicators.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update
Check device firmware version in Settings → About Device.
Wait 3 minutes for any recovery or completion.
generated_testcases.expected: After relaunch: App shows appropriate state. Device firmware version in About Device must match expected post-update version if update completed, or show previous version if update was interrupted. No mismatch between app UI state and actual device firmware version. Actual (If Bug): App shows 'Update Complete' but firmware version is old, or shows 99% frozen with no recovery path.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-011: Validate DFU progress during concurrent incoming call while stuck at 99% (Voyager 5200 Series)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 5200 Series connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update
Monitor progress until it reaches 99% (or stall at 99% if bug present).
From a second phone, call the connected phone's number.
Answer the call on the connected phone (via headset or phone speaker).
Keep call active for 30 seconds, then end call.
Observe DFU progress bar state immediately after call ends.
Wait 5 minutes for completion or failure.
generated_testcases.expected: After call ends: DFU progress bar must either resume and complete within 3 minutes, or show 'Update Failed' with retry option. No indefinite stall at 99%. Call audio must work normally during the call (no audio disruption from DFU). Actual (If Bug): DFU remains stuck at 99% indefinitely after call, or call audio is disrupted by DFU process.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-012: Validate DFU progress during concurrent media playback while stuck at 99% (Voyager 8200 UC)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 8200 UC connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update
Monitor progress until it reaches 99% (or stall at 99% if bug present).
Start media playback (music/podcast) on connected phone via headset.
Play for 30 seconds, then pause playback.
Observe DFU progress bar state immediately after pause.
Wait 5 minutes for completion or failure.
Resume media playback and verify audio quality.
generated_testcases.expected: After media pause: DFU progress bar must either resume and complete within 3 minutes, or show 'Update Failed' with retry option. No indefinite stall at 99%. Media playback must not stutter or distort during DFU. After DFU completes, media playback audio quality must be normal. Actual (If Bug): DFU remains stuck at 99% indefinitely after media interaction, or media audio is distorted/corrupted.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-013: Validate DFU progress bar granularity — percentage must update at least every 5 seconds during active update (Voyager 5200 Series)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 5200 Series connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update
Start screen recording or automated UI watcher to capture progress bar value every 2 seconds.
Run until 'Update Complete' or failure.
Analyze timestamps of each percentage change.
generated_testcases.expected: During active update (0%-98%), progress bar percentage must change at least once every 5 seconds. No single percentage value (including 99%) may persist for more than 30 seconds without advancing. If any percentage persists >30 seconds → FAIL (Bug: stall detected). Total gaps (periods >5s without change) must be ≤ 3 across entire update.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-014: Validate DFU progress bar granularity — percentage must update at least every 5 seconds during active update (Voyager 8200 UC)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 8200 UC connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update
Start screen recording or automated UI watcher to capture progress bar value every 2 seconds.
Run until 'Update Complete' or failure.
Analyze timestamps of each percentage change.
generated_testcases.expected: During active update (0%-98%), progress bar percentage must change at least once every 5 seconds. No single percentage value (including 99%) may persist for more than 30 seconds without advancing. If any percentage persists >30 seconds → FAIL (Bug: stall detected). Total gaps (periods >5s without change) must be ≤ 3 across entire update. Note: Voyager 8200 UC may have longer total time but per-percentage stall threshold remains ≤ 30 seconds.

generated_testcases.title: DFU-015: Validate DFU progress bar does not regress to lower percentage after reaching 99% (Voyager 5200 Series & Voyager 8200 UC)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 5200 Series OR Voyager 8200 UC connected, battery >50%, app in foreground.
Navigate to: Device → Firmware Update → Check for Update → Start Update
Monitor progress bar continuously (every 2 seconds) from 90% onward.
Record each percentage value with timestamp.
If progress reaches 99%, continue monitoring until 100% or failure.
Check for any regression (e.g., 99% → 95% → 99%).
generated_testcases.expected: Progress bar percentage must be monotonically non-decreasing. No regression to a lower percentage after reaching a higher one. If progress bar regresses from 99% to any lower value → FAIL (Bug: progress regression). Final state must be 100% with 'Update Complete' or explicit error state.
